# Pariksha

> India's national exam integrity platform. Anti-leak paper system with SHA-256 hashing, AI proxy detection via live face matching, and tri-party (institute + admin + superadmin) live integrity monitoring (TriShield).

Pariksha lets institutes publish secure online exams and lets candidates take them under verified, tamper-evident conditions. Candidates register with Aadhaar-hashed identity and a face baseline; every exam session is watermarked per-candidate and monitored for tab-switches, copy-paste, fullscreen exits, and proxy faces. Results, ranks, and certificates are generated instantly.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview, features, and how exam integrity is enforced end-to-end.
- [About](/about): Mission, the integrity stack (anti-leak, proctoring, TriShield), and who Pariksha is for.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): What data Pariksha collects, how it is hashed/encrypted, retention windows, and user rights.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): Eligibility, exam code of conduct, staff-code confidentiality, IP, and liability.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public routes.
